name: agent-md-writer
description: Generate and maintain high-quality CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md files for any project. Every generated file includes Karpathy-inspired behavior principles, and when detected, context7-first docs lookup and DESIGN.md consultation for UI generation. Handles legacy AGENT.md → AGENTS.md migration. Ships 3 imperative slash commands (/agent-md:create, /agent-md:update, /agent-md:audit) that parallelize filesystem detection via Explore subagents to protect the main context window.
author: hgflima
